source_pr.title: util: fix unstable test in the TestNotifyErrorWaitGroupWrapper
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

```NotifyErrorWaitGroupWrapper``` should use the Multi-Producers scene. if producers work in a short time. the Wait will make the program early finish.
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #33062

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: util: fix unstable test in the TestNotifyErrorWaitGroupWrapper
failure_signature: util: fix unstable test in the TestNotifyErrorWaitGroupWrapper
root_cause_explanation: `NotifyErrorWaitGroupWrapper` had a concurrency/ordering issue in multi-producer scenarios (goroutines finishing quickly could cause the wait/notify lifecycle to complete early), making `TestNotifyErrorWaitGroupWrapper` flaky. This PR fixes the race by ensuring the notify channel is only closed after all producer goroutines have finished (deterministic join/close ordering).
fix_pattern: Fix wait-group wrapper lifecycle: ensure all producer goroutines are joined before closing the notify channel to avoid racey early completion in concurrent tests.

evidence: evidence: util: fix unstable test in the TestNotifyErrorWaitGroupWrapper
files: executor/analyze.go, go.mod, go.sum, util/wait_group_wrapper.go, util/wait_group_wrapper_test.go
